title: Walking Aids - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Walking Aids 4 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used medical equipment, such as walkers, canes, wheelchairs, bath seats and more. Accepts donations of clean and functional equipment. Does not accept items such as lift chairs, knee or back braces, orthopedic boots, medical beds, CPAP's or nebulizers. 1114 SW Frazer Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 276-1130 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HARNEY COUNTY HARNEY HUB SENIOR AND COMMUNITY CENTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides utility assistance for gas, electric, and heating fuel bills; motel vouchers; one-time gas vouchers; transportation passes; food pantry (visit twice per month); Fresh Alliance program (provides fresh produce, dairy, and bread products); weatherization services; and blood pressure screenings. Offers snack kits. Assistive medical equipment and mobility aids also available. 17 S Alder Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: -Food pantry: Households at or below 300% federal poverty level. No proof of income is required. -Fresh Alliance: Unrestricted -Snack kits for those looking to keep moving through the community -Motel vouchers: Homeless individuals requiring one night's stay -Gas vouchers: Must be stuck and looking to continue to move through the community -Transportation passes: Must have no ties to the community and looking to continue to move through the community -Energy Assistance: Household must meet federal poverty guidelines Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Fresh Alliance: Monday 10am-10:30am Food pantry: Wednesday 10am-1pm, Thursday 4pm-6pm Email (541) 573-6024 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HASL CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Loans wheelchairs, walkers, canes, crutches, bath aids, and other items to people in need of assistive technology. 305 NE E Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 9am-3pm, Wednesday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm Email (541) 479-4275 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST JOHN'S MEDICAL LOAN CLOSET MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lends durable medical equipment on a short-term basis, typically no longer than 3 months. Inventory includes wheelchairs, walkers, knee scooters, crutches, canes, toilet risers and commodes, shower stools, and transfer benches. Accepts donations of similar durable medical equipment. 795 Franklin Avenue SW Bandon, OR 97411 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but focus is on serving individuals recovering from surgery or an accident, those in hospice care, and those waiting for purchase authorization from their insurance carrier Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 590-2443 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS HARNEY COUNTY HARNEY HUB SENIOR AND COMMUNITY CENTER SERVICES HASL CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS ST JOHN'S MEDICAL LOAN CLOSET MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS
